untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of MACD histogram making lower peaks (contraction relative to prior peak value) and histogram crossing below its prior peak — these require multi-bar lookback comparisons and peak detection logic not expressible with simple 3-field conditions. The 'histogram_lookback_bars' and 'min_histogram_decline_percent' parameters are undefined. Additionally, the momentum weakening condition (diminishing distance between fast/slow MA despite higher highs) requires relative comparison logic not supported by allowed operators.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses basic MACD histogram crossing and MA positioning, but core signal logic—detecting histogram contraction and peak deterioration—cannot be faithfully represented. Recommend implementing custom peak-detection logic or divergence-specific indicator in backtest engine.
